message:
refactor(firecracker): switch CreateVM from --no-api to API mode

Replace the config file-based approach with full Firecracker API mode:
- Start firecracker with --api-sock instead of --no-api --config-file
- Configure VM via HTTP API calls (boot source, drive, network, machine config)
- Set up MMDS for cloud-init data delivery
- Return VMInfo (with APISocketPath) instead of VM

This enables runtime VM control and MMDS-based cloud-init delivery.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
